# dokploy_environment (Data Source)

Fetches an existing Dokploy environment within a project. Useful for referencing environments created automatically by Dokploy (such as the default "production" environment). Look it up either by name or by id.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `project_id` (String) The ID of the project the environment belongs to.

### Optional

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the environment. Either id or name must be set.
- `name` (String) The name of the environment (e.g. "production"). Either name or id must be set.

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) The description of the environment.
